# Entropía Studios

> Entropía Studios is a Madrid-based film and series production company founded by Sebastián Cepeda and Javier Krause. It develops and produces feature films, documentaries, series and docuseries with a clear international vocation, believing in entropy as a fertile territory where powerful ideas emerge from chaos. Contact: info@entropia-studios.com

The site is bilingual (English, Spanish) with parallel URLs under /en/ and /es/.

## Main pages
- [Work (home)](https://entropia-studios.com/en/): full list of projects
- [About](https://entropia-studios.com/en/#about): company statement and team
- [Contact](https://entropia-studios.com/en/#contact): offices and email info@entropia-studios.com

## Projects
- [The Last Lap](https://entropia-studios.com/en/work/the-last-lap/) — Series, in production
- [Las Heras](https://entropia-studios.com/en/work/las-heras/) — Feature film, in pre-production
- [Foodball](https://entropia-studios.com/en/work/foodball/) — Series, in development
- [Body Hunters](https://entropia-studios.com/en/work/body-hunters/) — Series, in development
- [Inner Portrait](https://entropia-studios.com/en/work/inner-portrait/) — Documentary, 2025 (Disney+)
- [Bionica](https://entropia-studios.com/en/work/bionica/) — Feature film, 2025
- [You and Everything Else](https://entropia-studios.com/en/work/you-and-everything-else/) — Series, 2025 (Netflix, Kakao Entertainment)
- [Villa Malaga](https://entropia-studios.com/en/work/villa-malaga/) — Documentary, 2024. Winner of the Silver Biznaga at the 27th Málaga Film Festival
- [NCCR Robotics](https://entropia-studios.com/en/work/nccr-robotics/) — Documentary, 2023
- [El Color del Cielo](https://entropia-studios.com/en/work/el-color-del-cielo/) — Feature film, 2022
- [Contigo Capitán](https://entropia-studios.com/en/work/contigo-capitan/) — Series, 2022 (Netflix)
- [L'Arminuta](https://entropia-studios.com/en/work/larminuta/) — Feature film, 2021 (HBO)
- [Singularity](https://entropia-studios.com/en/work/singularity/) — Feature film, 2017 (starring John Cusack)
- [Himmelfahrtskommando](https://entropia-studios.com/en/work/himmelfahrtskommando/) — Feature film, 2013

## Offices
- Spain: Entropía Studios S.L., Calle Princesa 31, 2-2, 28008 Madrid
- Switzerland: Viven Film AG, Kernstrasse 57, 8004 Zurich
- Netherlands: KFP, Mezenlaan 5, 1403BP Bussum
- Italy: Garage Entertainment SRL, Viale del Vignola 111, 00196 Roma
